description: Specialized-curriculum adaptive profiles and phase-rule advice for the browser controller. Browser online learning is disabled in this build; player-selected physics parameters are never modified.
phaseRuleSpecialization: phase rules may include parameter-regime suffixes pa/pg/pf/pw so high-acc, low-g, friction and wind advice do not overwrite each other
successDefinition: browser handoff: a short dwell inside a broad safe capture basin that the terminal local controller can quickly stabilize
scoreDefinition: macro average across specialties with a worst-specialty floor, capture/settling rewards, and edge/wrong-energy penalties
